name: common-sql-language-service
description: Language service for general sql language
author: Microsoft Corporation

scripts.test:int: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration --verbose > engineering/test/logs/IntegrationTest.log 2>&1
scripts.testWordCompletion: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/WordCompletion --verbose > engineering/test/logs/WordCompletion.log 2>&1
scripts.testErrorDetection: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/ErrorDetection --verbose > engineering/test/logs/ErrorDetection.log 2>&1
scripts.testQuickInfo: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/QuickInfo --verbose > engineering/test/logs/QuickInfo.log 2>&1
scripts.testSignatureHelp: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/SignatureHelp --verbose > engineering/test/logs/SignatureHelp.log 2>&1
scripts.testOutputSchema: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/OutputSchema --verbose > engineering/test/logs/OutputSchema.log 2>&1
scripts.testCodeFormatting: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/CodeFormatting --verbose > engineering/test/logs/CodeFormatting.log 2>&1
scripts.testCodeFolding: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/CodeFolding --verbose > engineering/test/logs/CodeFolding.log 2>&1
scripts.testGotoDefinition: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/GotoDefinition --verbose > engineering/test/logs/GotoDefinition.log 2>&1
scripts.testGotoReferences: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/GotoReferences --verbose > engineering/test/logs/GotoReferences.log 2>&1
scripts.testCodeAction: npm run createTestFolder && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config engineering/test/jest.config.js engineering/test/integration/CodeAction --verbose > engineering/test/logs/CodeAction.log 2>&1
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:int
scripts.auth: cd CommonSqlCore && npm run auth && cd ../CommonSqlFacade && npm run auth
scripts.postinstall: cd ./CommonSqlCore && npm install && cd ../CommonSqlFacade && npm install
scripts.build: cd CommonSqlCore && npm run build && cd ../CommonSqlFacade && npm run compile && tsc
